function(ply)
	local cade = ply:CadeInfront("models/devolved/ttt/soilbag.mdl",200,"Insta Grow")
	cade:SetAngles(Angle(270,0,0))
end

function(ply)

	return true
end

items.name: Skeleton
items.luaUse:
function(ply)
	if !ply:Alive() or ply:IsSpec() then
		ply:Notify("Must be alive to use this!",4)
		return
	end
	
	if ply:GetModel() != "models/player/skeleton.mdl" then
		ply.oModel = ply:GetModel()
		ply:Notify("You became a skeleton!",10)
		ply:SetModel("models/player/skeleton.mdl")
		Dev.DidSkeleton[ply:SteamID()] = true
		table.insert(Dev.IsSkeleton,ply)
	else
		ply:Notify("You are no longer a skeleton!",10)
		ply:SetModel(ply.oModel or "models/player/phoenix.mdl")
		ply.oModel = nil
	end
end
items.luaCheckUse:
function(ply)
	--[[
	if Dev.DidSkeleton[ply:SteamID()] then
		ply:Notify("You have already been a skeleton this map!",10)
		return false
	end
	]]--
	
	return true
end

items.name: Shit
items.luaUse:
function(ply)
	if !ply:Alive() or ply:IsSpec() then
		ply:Notify("Must be alive to use this!",4)
		return
	end
	if ply.ShitRound then ply:Notify("You already have taken a shit this round!",4) return end
	ply.ShitRound = true
	
	local poop = ents.Create("poop")
	poop:SetPos(ply:GetPos()+Vector(0,0,14))
	poop:Spawn()
	
	local num,closest = 22220
	for k,v in pairs(ents.FindInSphere(ply:GetPos()+Vector(0,0,0,14),68)) do
		if v.player_ragdoll and v:GetPos():Distance(ply:GetPos()+Vector(0,0,0,14)) < num then
			closest = v
			num = v:GetPos():Distance(ply:GetPos()+Vector(0,0,0,14))
		end
	end
	
	if !closest or !closest:IsValid() then
		net.Start("Dev_ShitOn")
			net.WriteString(ply:Name() .. " just took a shit!")
		net.Broadcast()
	else
		local bodyname = "An unidentified body"
		if closest:GetNWString("nick") and closest:GetNWString("nick") != "" then
			bodyname = closest:GetNWString("nick")
		end
		
		net.Start("Dev_ShitOn")
			net.WriteString(ply:Name() .. " has just shit on " .. bodyname .. "!")
		net.Broadcast()
	end
end
items.luaCheckUse:
function(ply) // check if they are alive or have shit this round
	if !ply:Alive() or ply:IsSpec() then
		ply:Notify("Must be alive to use this!",4)
		return false
	end
	if ply.ShitRound then
		ply:Notify("You already have taken a shit this round!",4)
		return false
	end
	return true
end

items.name: Double XP 24 Hour
items.luaUse:
function(ply)
	table.insert(ply.DTTT.extras,"item_Double XP 12 Hour")
	table.insert(ply.DTTT.extras,"item_Double XP 12 Hour")
	ply:Notify("Split 24 hour XPs into two 12 hours")
	ply:SaveTTT("extras")
	ply:SendInfo("extras")
end

items.name: Double XP 12 Hour
items.luaUse:
function(ply)
	ply.DTTT.xp_2x = os.time()-43200
	ply:Notify("You will now have double XP for the next 12 hours.",12)
	ply:SaveTTT("xp_2x")
	
end
items.luaCheckUse:
function(ply) // check if they already have one
	if ply.DTTT.xp_2x and (os.time()-ply.DTTT.xp_2x < 86399) then
		ply:Notify("You cannot stack double XP!",12)
		ply:Notify("Time left on your double XP: " .. math.Round(1440-((os.time()-ply.DTTT.xp_2x)/60),2) .. " minutes",12)
		return false
	end
	return true
end

items.name: Citizen
items.luaUse:
function(ply)
	ply.DTTT.citizen = true
	ply:Notify("You will be a citizen next round!",14)
	ply:SaveTTT("citizen")

end
items.luaCheckUse:
function(ply) // check if they already have one equipped
	if ply.DTTT.citizen then
		ply:Notify("You already have a citizen item set for next round.",14)
		return false
	end
	
	return true
end

items.name: 10,000 XP
items.luaUse:
function(ply)
	ply:AddEXP(10000)
	ply:Notify("Gained 10,000 XP.",9)
	ply:SendInfo()
	ply:SaveTTT()
end

items.name: Banner
items.luaCheckUse:
function(ply)
	// Setup their banner
	
	if ply.ForumID then
		Dev_SH.CheckMaxBanners(ply.ForumID,function(count)
			if !ply:IsValid() then return end // gg
			
			if count >= 3 then
				ply:Notify("You already have the maximum amount of banners (3)",20)
			else
				if !table.HasValue(ply.DTTT.extras,"item_Banner") then
					return
				end
				table.remove(ply.DTTT.extras,table.KeyFromValue(ply.DTTT.extras,"item_Banner"))
				ply:SendInfo("extras")
				
				Dev_SH.AddBanners(ply.ForumID,function()
					if ply:IsValid() then
						ply:Notify("You used a Devolved banner item!",20)
						ply:Notify("Go to our website and visit your control panel to upload an image.",20)
					end
				end,"image")
				
				ply:SaveTTT("extras")
			end
		end)
	else
		ply:Notify("You need to sign up on our website to use this.",20)
	end
	
	return false
end

items.name: Banner with URL
items.luaCheckUse:
function(ply)
	// Setup their banner
	
	if ply.ForumID then
		Dev_SH.CheckMaxBanners(ply.ForumID,function(count)
			if !ply:IsValid() then return end // gg
			
			if count >= 3 then
				ply:Notify("You already have the maximum amount of banners (3)",20)
			else
				if !table.HasValue(ply.DTTT.extras,"item_Banner with URL") then
					return
				end
				table.remove(ply.DTTT.extras,table.KeyFromValue(ply.DTTT.extras,"item_Banner with URL"))
				ply:SendInfo("extras")
				
				Dev_SH.AddBanners(ply.ForumID,function()
					if ply:IsValid() then
						ply:Notify("You used a Devolved banner with URL item!",20)
						ply:Notify("Go to our website and visit your control panel to upload an image and set a URL.",20)
					end
				end,"url")
				
				ply:SaveTTT("extras")
			end
		end)
	else
		ply:Notify("You need to sign up on our website to use this.",20)
	end
	
	return false
end

taunts.name: Zombie
taunts.luaStart:
function(ply,starter)
		if ply == starter then
			ply:EmitSound("npc/zombie/zombie_voice_idle" .. math.random(1,9) .. ".wav")
		end
		
	end

taunts.name: Zombie Attack
taunts.luaStart:
function(ply,starter)
		if ply == starter then
			ply:EmitSound("npc/zombie/zo_attack" .. math.random(1,2) .. ".wav")
			
			timer.Simple(.7,function()
				ply:EmitSound("npc/zombie/claw_miss" .. math.random(1,2) .. ".wav")
			end)
		end
		
		local startPos = ply:EyePos()-Vector(0,0,10)
		
		timer.Simple(.65,function()
			if !IsValid(ply) then return end
		
			local tr = util.TraceLine( {
				start = startPos,
				endpos = startPos + (Angle(0,ply:GetAngles().y,0):Forward()*80),
				filter = ply,
			} )
			
			if tr.Entity and tr.Entity:IsValid() then
				tr.Entity:TakeDamage(50,ply,ply)
				ply:EmitSound("npc/zombie/zombie_hit.wav")
			end
		end)
		
	end

taunts.name: Dance
taunts.luaStart:
function(ply,starter)
		if ply == starter then
			ply.Sound = CreateSound(ply,Sound("Devolved/conga.wav"))
			ply.Sound:Play()
			ply.Sound:ChangeVolume(.25,0)
		end
		
		ply.conga = true
	end
taunts.luaStop:
function(ply,starter)
		if ply == starter then
			ply.Sound:Stop()
		end
		
		ply.conga = false
	end

taunts.name: Muscle
taunts.luaStart:
function(ply,starter)
		if ply == starter then
			ply.Sound = CreateSound(ply,Sound("Devolved/muscle.wav"))
			ply.Sound:Play()
			ply.Sound:ChangeVolume(.15,0)
		end
		
		ply.conga = true
	end
taunts.luaStop:
function(ply,starter)
		if ply == starter then
			ply.Sound:Stop()
		end
		
		ply.conga = false
	end

quests.name: The Detective
quests.description:
The hunt for traitors is on.
I've been detecting traitors since the Robby days, much like that
stupid jihadist has been blowing up our fellow innocent.

Don't listen to that guy. He's nuts.

Instead of blowing people up, I'll have you fight for the innocents.
I'll show you the ways of a detective.

First, I want you to scan 4 players using a Detector.

quests.name: The Detective 2
quests.description:
Welcome back.

The next thing detectives should always do is place down a health station.
So all I want you to do is place down 3 health stations.

quests.name: Devolved Beginnings
quests.description:
Hello there! I am Bobby, the son of Robby. Robby was the original saviour
here in the Devolved Universe, but one day everything changed.

From legend, to nothing in one day.
I don't want to talk about it.
It was a sad day for us all.

Now I do what my father told me I was destined to do.
Help the people of this universe understand the story of Devolved;
and fight back the evil that took our saviour Robby.

Before any of this, though, you're going to have to learn the basics
in our small Devolved Universe.

First things first, I'd like you to buy some scratch cards that Robby created for us.
To make sure the economy balanced out, he distributed stuff through Scratch Cards.
Press F1, and visit the "Lottery" tab. Buy 5 scratch cards - they will be FREE!

Note: You must start this quest for the 5 scratch cards to be free.

quests.name: Devolved Beginnings 2
quests.description:
Welcome back, young Devolved One.

Robby always loved construction and building.
He had one of the biggest defence bases around... before everything changed.

Robby brought us cades - which is what I'd like you to do next.
Cades are basically spawnable props - but you can rotate and nail them down.

Spawn a cade; any cade. You can find them inside of the F1 Store tab
 inside of the cading section.

quests.name: Devolved Beginnings 3
quests.description:
Welcome back, young Devolved One.

Robby was a constructor. He made a lot of cool stuff.

Robby needed a way to give items to the general public,
however he didn't have enough quality stuff to go around;
so he made something called crates.

These crates were randomly given to the citizens
of the Devolved Universe over time, and inside the crates
are some really lame stuff, and some really cool stuff.

He made his artificially intelligent robots give out the crates,
so to this day they still are given to the citizens.

What is this "stuff" I am talking about? You shall soon find out.

I want you to find 2 of these crates.
All you have to do is stick around, and you'll randomly find them.
No actual searching required.

Note: You need at least 4 players online for a crate drop.

quests.name: Devolved Beginnings 4
quests.description:
Welcome back, young Devolved One.

I have already told you the story behind crates, but now comes
the next part: Opening them. This is where things get a bit different.

Since Robby didn't have enough quality stuff, as explained before,
he had to make sure he didn't drain all of Devolved's resources.

To do so, there is a lock added onto every crate. These locks require
some type of key to open them - which you can either craft, buy in the
player market, trade for it, or buy it in the Devolved Store.

This way, it ensures everything will balance out in the economy of
the Devolved Universe.

You can buy it in the market tab of the F4 menu, using the
search box. Or click "View the Devolved Store" in the top left 
to buy it with Wallet Cash.

---------------------------------------------------

In the F4 menu, you can craft items and crates together.

2 of the same item = 1 refined metal
2 of any combination of items = 1 reclaimed metal
2 reclaimed metal = 1 refined metal

2 refined metal = 1 refined metal stack

1 key = 3 refined metal stacks

Once you get the hang of it, it should be easy.

---------------------------------------------------

NOW FOR THE LAST PART!
Use this Metal Key to open one of the crates you have received.
Right click the crate in your inventory, and open it.

All you have to do is open 1 crate. And I will pay you for doing it too!

quests.name: Devolved Beginnings 5
quests.description:
Welcome back, young Devolved One.

Hopefully you understand the basics of the Devolved Universe.
Now, it's time to spend some Jackoolios!

Please purchase 20 Scratch Cards, then report back to me.
I wish the best of luck with your gambling in the Devolved Universe.

quests.name: I am a Doctor
quests.description:
DON'T WORRY, I'M A DOCTOR.

That's what they say about me.
I am the best Doctor in all the lands.
I've been a Doctor since Devolved's Beginnings.
When Robby was still around.

That day... many call it the Robby Day...
I don't even want to think about it. I... tried...
 
So I've been teaching newcomers how to be a good Doctor.
To prevent something like that from happening again.

Please, heal yourself 5 times for me.

quests.id: Let me heal your wounds gurl
quests.name: Let me heal your wounds gurl
quests.description:
Welcome back.

The next thing I want you to learn is how to heal others.
It's pretty easy, just use the alternate function of our medkits.
Heal 5 other people - not yourself - this time, then report back.

quests.name: The Doctor
quests.description:
Time for a bit of grinding.

Now I'd like you to do 5 of each.
So, heal yourself 5 times.
Then, heal someone else 5 times.

needBefore.name: Let me heal your wounds gurl

quests.name: Homies 1
quests.description:
What up bra how you doin. I am Deez.
Fuck that fuckin George guy. I got some easy quests.

Are you part of a gang yet man? You should join one.
If you are part of a gang, you can get some a dem homie deaths
just by dieing next to your homies.

That's right. You get XP just for dieing next to da homies.
That's where it at doe. Die next to yo homies 25 times.
I got da Jackoolios - no worries.

Do it for da homies.

quests.name: Homies 2
quests.description:
Sup Lil Bitch

Next I want you 25 of your homies to die next to you.
Your homies must DIE - NEXT TO YOU - AND YOU MUST LIVE.
Hope it feels good.

quests.name: Homies 3
quests.description:
YOU KNOW WHAT FUCK IT.

FUCK GANGS. After this quest, I am out of here.

KILL 20 OTHER PLAYERS (T/INNO KILLS) WHO
  ARE FROM ANOTHER GANG.

 ALSO...

   DEEZ NUTS HA GOT EM

quests.name: Gangs 1
quests.description:
Ignore that Deez person. He is quite the character.
His idea of a quest is stupid and lazy. Just die? As a quest?
Funny joke.

This one will take a bit more teamwork.
Stay alive and nearby your gang members during the round.
Help your gang members stay alive as well.

I want your gang members to get 10 T Kills near you.
You'll get bonus XP when they get kills next to you.

Next up is innocent kills.

quests.name: Gangs 2
quests.description:
Hey there, welcome back.
This one is just like the last one, except this time
I want your gang members to get Inno Kills near you.

Should be pretty easy.

quests.name: Gangs 3
quests.description:
Welcome back, yet again.

I love this place. This quest window, yes - it's so great.
Why was I ever president? It's so much better here.
In this quest window.
So very fun.

Anyway, this time I want you to get 10
traitor kills while being near your gang members.

That's it. Just kill traitors with your gang members.

quests.name: Life of a Hobo
quests.description:
Errrrrrr ey man. I am a litle tipsy rite noow.

I am jst a street hobo, butt most cal me fearless captain!
I can show you the ways of the hobo life. I been a hobo all devolved's life.

Frrst, driink 10 beeers. All true hobos get drnk.

quests.name: Life of a Hobo 2
quests.description:
Eyyy mann welcme bak!! You seeem like cool guy.
I drrnk some beerrs of my own while yo wer gon.
Gots a bowl of space cereal too.
youu should get yurself some space cerela too mann.

The drrnk hobo liffe is grate. Don't yo thinkin so?
I have kindaa this crazy hobo side of me mann,
murder is fun.

Kill 10 people while drrnk of your ass for me.

quests.name: Life of a Hobo 3
quests.description:
Hey man, sorry about that. I was pretty drunk before.
I'm actually a crazy hobo named Fearless Captain, but I usually don't drink that much.
I'll try to stay off the Robby Beer now - that stuff is crazy.

So, I have this crate. I can't open it though.
It requires a spoon to open, but I can't get a spoon myself.

I've heard to create a spoon you need an old boot, a steel reserve, and a donut.

So instead, I have a list of stuff I want you to do.
If you complete the list, I will give you the crate.
5 Headshots
5 T Kills
5 Melee Kills

Also, bring me 3 reclaimed metal. I use it for my house.

quests.name: Crate Creation 1
quests.description:
You like that crate? Hah! Want to know something, kid?
I created that crate myself.

Yep, and I named it too. Hobo Crate. It's the first crate not created by Robby's Artificial Intelligence.

I figured out how to bypass the system years ago. I've never leaked this information to anyone before.
But now, Jackool found the dusty old Quest system that Robby created before... the day.
He figured out how to implement it. And now, I'm back. I was stuck in the system for years.

I became crazy, and a drunk. That Robby Beer; you have no idea.
Now, I shall pass on this information to everyone! YES! I WILL BYPASS ROBBY'S SYSTEM
MWAHAHAHAHAHAAH

I NEED REFINED METAL THIS TIME. 2 OF THEM. THAT'S ALL!!!
I HAVE MORE OF THESE HOBO CRATES. WANT ANOTHER?

quests.name: The Jihadist 1
quests.description:
ALLAHU AKBAR! ALLAHU AKBAR! ALLAHU AKBAR! ALLAHU AKBAR! ALLAHU AKBAR! ALLAHU AKBAR! ALLAHU AKBAR! ALLAHU AKBAR! 

LALALALALALALA

JIHAD 4 TIMES! GO GO GO!

quests.name: The Jihadist 2
quests.description:
Your first mission was just a test.

I am here to train you with your explosive handling skills.
There are lots of ways to cause explosions and harm in the Devolved Universe,
and I'm going to help you out with them.

First, the most basic type of stealth explosion: C4
Plant 4 C4's as a traitor and make sure they successfully explode.

quests.name: The Jihadist 3
quests.description:
Now it's time to increase the difficulty.
10 Jihads, 10 C4s. Bigger payout.

quests.name: The Jihadist 4
quests.description:
Thought you were grinding before? Try this out for size.
 
I promise this is the last time you have to do this.
 
I just want to make sure you know what your doing before we continue.
To be a good terrorist, you must hare krishna and blow everyone up anytime you can.
Once I've tested you enough, I can give you my knowledge and tools that you don't have.

quests.name: Silent Killer 1
quests.description:
The silent killer is the only killer.

The best way to take people out as a traitor is silently.
Never to be seen.
First I want you to knife kill 4 players.

quests.name: Silent Killer 2
quests.description:
Next I'd like you to take out 8 people with the silenced pistol.
This time the reward is a lot greater.

quests.name: Silent Killer 3
quests.description:
The next silent weapon is the silenced sniper.
Snipe 12 people with this, and get a great reward.
Coming soon - I'll be giving you a special crate.

quests.name: Smoke dat kush
quests.description:
Yo man, I'm Red Rover. You smokadakush?
Because if you don't, I'm forcing you to!
I've been smoking weed on Devolved since the Robby days,
and now it's my destiny to get everyone baked.

Find someone with some bud and have them smoke you out.
Or, if you have your own weed - smoke it all to yourself.
Someone might be selling joints on the market, who knows.
That's all you gotta do, just smoke some weed mane.

I just have to make sure you are a true stoner before we continue.
Then we can start growing some weed.

quests.name: Grow dat kush
quests.description:
Now then, it's time to grow some bud!
I'm so excited. I've been stuck in this Devolved menu since the Robby days.
Robby originally put me in here so I would stop polluting the air with pot smoke.

Hah! I'll show him. I want you to grow some bud for me.
6 bags of Outdoor Kush should do. I'll pay 1,000 Jackoolios for that since you are new to this.
Make sure you grow this weed outside. These plants need light in order to grow.
Just place the seed on the plant pot and it will start growing weed.
Make sure you don't let your plant die.

quests.name: Grow dat kush 2
quests.description:
You think that was a lot of weed?
Hah! Yeah right. That shitty outdoor grown bud sucks.

In fact, this will only last me about an hour. If that.
I need more than this, ASAP. Bring me 12 bags this time.

Meanwhile, I'll be smoking it up.
I can't grow it myself. I'm stuck here. So grow it for me.

quests.name: Grow dat kush 3
quests.description:
Thanks for the bud mane. This still isn't enough though.
I need more, let's be honest. This will barely last me half a day.
Not only am I smoking it, but I am the Devolved Druglord. I sell pounds and pounds daily.

I don't need these stupid small bags. I rarely sell small amounts like this.
Craft 21 bags of Outdoor Kush together to get a pound.

Bring me a pound - and realize you're just getting started. Get ready to mass produce weed.
I'm going to start paying you less and less, though. Profit margins matter more than our friendship, sorry mate.

I am getting prepared to start a monopoly on this weed selling business. Maybe I should create some sort of stock market...

quests.name: Grow dat kush 4
quests.description:
You ready for mass production? Because I am.

I have more utilities for you to use.
But these ones aren't going to be free.
I will trade each new utility for a lot of bud.

The first one I have for you is Robby's Anti-Thief spray.
This will increase your production cost, but it will disallow other people from cropping your weed.
Once applied to a pot, you don't need to apply it again.

quests.name: Grow dat kush 5
quests.description:
Yo what up man!

The next utility I have is very important.
Because of that, I want 3 pounds for it. I stole them from Robby's house after the... day. Along with a lot of other stuff.

Sorry, but these things mean a lot to me.

This is a growing light; it will allow you to grow your plants indoors.
Just put your plant under the light, and it'll grow just like it would outside.

Not only that, but if you grow your weed from start to finish indoors - you will get Indoor Kush. However, if your plant ever touches the outdoor light - it will automatically be Outdoor Kush.
I wish you luck with growing plants in the Devolved Universe.

quests.name: Grow dat kush 6
quests.description:
Hey mane, welcome back.

Time to put that growing light to work.
I have another really important utility, and I also want 4 pounds for this one.
However, I want 4 pounds of Indoor Kush this time. Not Outdoor Kush.
Indoor Kush brings more profit in, and is much danker than Outdoor Kush.

You'll have to put that growing light to use now.

The next utility I have for you is another plant pot.
This plant pot can carry two plants at once, and is rectangular.
This will allow you to mass produce plants easier.

I stole these from Robby's house as well. So they have sentimental value to me.

quests.name: New Years Quest #1
quests.description:
Happy new years!
Now time to help Santa out, if you want.
Why the hell did I give out presents?

Now I have to clean up a bunch of these damn hats!

Tell you what. You give me 100 Santa Hats, and I will give you a special New Years Crate 2015.
This crate contains 1 of 6 different permanent, non expiring hats.
The items in this crate all have the same rarity, meaning you have as 1 in 6 chance for your favorite.

Thanks for ho-ho-helping me clean up the ho-ho-hat mess!
I have additional crates to give out after this one too.

quests.name: New Years Quest #2
quests.description:
Same thing, different item.

This time I want 50 Blue Partyhats.

quests.name: New Years Quest #3
quests.description:
Same thing, different item.

This time I want 50 Green Partyhats.

quests.name: New Years Quest #4
quests.description:
Same thing, different item.

This time I want 50 Green Partyhats.

quests.name: 420 2015 Quest 1
quests.description:
It's the week of 4/20 2015!
 
For a limited time, get some new crafting recipes
through the 420 2015 Crate. These crafting recipes
will obviously be limited since you can only get them
from this quest and crate.
 
Give me a couple pounds of Indoor and Outdoor kush first.
 
After I give you this crate, I have a few more - but they will
require some of the new recipes instead (and trading most likely)

quests.name: 420 2015 Quest 2
quests.description:
It's the week of 4/20 2015!

This time I'm looking for two grams of hash. You may need to trade
with someone who has the hash recipe and can craft it.
 
Going to put it on my joint and get more baked.

quests.name: 420 2015 Quest 3
quests.description:
It's the week of 4/20 2015!

This time I'm looking for two dank brownies. You may need to trade
with someone who has the brownie recipe and can craft it.
 
Edibles are the best. Less harsh on the lungs, y'know?

quests.name: 420 2015 Quest 4
quests.description:
It's the week of 4/20 2015!

You might have gotten extra Indoor Joint recipes in the last two crates.
If you did, I will trade two for another crate.
Or you could buy the recipe off someone else.
 
This will give you another chance at a different recipe.
This is the last crate I'll be giving out.

quests.name: Survival of the Fittest
quests.description:
Hello young Devolved One.
 
I am the survivor, I have survived many years of Devolved's past.
Through the hard times, and the easy times - I was there.
I've been through it all, I've seen it all.

And now it's time to pass it on to you.
First, on the topic of survival - I want you to be the last innocent remaining 4 times. Do this, then report back to me.

quests.name: Survival of the Fittest 2
quests.description:
Welcome back, young Devolved One.

It looks like you finished the first task. My expectations weren't very high.
But it looks like you did a good job.

Before I hand my survivalist knowledge and tools onto you, I am going to put you through a series of tasks.
That was your first task.

Next up - stay alive during post round 4 times. Also, get 4 post round kills. Good luck.
